title: Moult health report
description: Typed output contract for `moult health`. One of Moult's two protected APIs. The composite is a confidence-graded health SIGNAL aggregated from the other analyses, never a verdict: it carries its contributing components and their reasons so the number is auditable, and it never asserts a pass/fail. The components list is open: future analyses (boundaries, flags) plug in as additional entries without a schema bump.

schema_version.description: Bumped only on a breaking change to this shape.

window.description: Human description of the churn window fed to the complexity component.

since.description: Resolved --since boundary, when an explicit one was given.

overall.description: The composite health signal. score/grade are null only when no component ran.

components_present.description: Components that actually contributed to the composite.

files_total.description: Signal-bearing files; files[] may be display-limited but this is the full count.

components.description: One entry per considered analysis. Absent analyses still appear (present=false) so the record of what ran is honest. Open-ended: new analyses add entries without a schema bump.

files.description: Per-file roll-up, the cross-analysis join surface. Each file carries its contributing symbol_ids so findings join to the hotspots/deadcode/duplication/coverage contracts.

nullable_unit_interval.description: A health score in [0, 1] (1 = healthy), or null where not asserted. A graded signal, never a verdict.

grade.description: Letter grade bucketed from a health score. A coarse reading of the same signal, never a pass/fail gate.

reason.description: One auditable contribution to a component's sub-score. `value` is the observed [0, 1] quantity (a ratio/sub-score), not a signed delta - health sub-scores are ratios, not delta-sums.

component.description: One graded component of the composite. Carries its category, its static weight, its renormalized share among present components, an auditable stats summary, and its reasons. Never asserts certainty.

present.description: Whether this analysis contributed to the composite.

score.description: Health sub-score in [0, 1] (1 = healthy); null when the component is absent.

weight.description: Static, pinned weight of this component before renormalization.

normalized_weight.description: Share of the composite this component carried, renormalized over present components; null when absent.

summary.description: Small free-form stats hash backing the sub-score (counts/ratios). Auditable, not a strict surface; {} when absent.

reasons.description: The observations behind the sub-score, in application order.

diagnostic.description: Why a component was skipped or errored; null when it contributed normally.

file.description: One file's rolled-up health. Joins to the other analyses via the symbol_ids it lists.

components.description: Per-component sub-scores for this file, present components only. Open-ended map keyed by component name.

symbol_ids.description: Contributing join keys ("<path>:<start_line>:<fqname>"), shared with the other contracts. Capped for payload size; symbol_count records the true total.

symbol_count.description: Total contributing symbols before the symbol_ids cap.
